name: Randy Pollak's Christmas Persimmon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add persimmon pulp, chopped nuts, raisins, dates, and orange peel to the butter mixture.
3. Sift together the flour, soda, cinnamon, cloves, allspice, nutmeg.
4. Alternately add the sifted flour mixture and milk to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with flour.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Pour the batter into two well-greased loaf pans (9 x 3 inches each).
7. Bake at 300°F for 1 3/4 hours or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cakes to cool completely before removing from the pans.
